description: Entries about job search, asking about career progress

memory_chunks.content: Applied to 12 jobs this week. Mostly backend engineer roles. I've been tailoring each cover letter which is exhausting but I think it's the right approach.
Got a rejection from the startup I was most excited about. Stings. The feedback was that I'm not senior enough for the role. Need to build more visible projects.
First interview tomorrow at a mid-size fintech. Nervous but prepared. I've done three mock interviews this week and feel solid on system design.
Passed the technical screen at two companies this week. Both have moved me to final rounds. Starting to feel like the job search is finally getting somewhere.

query: How is my job search and career progression going?
